changes: PvP actions will be equipped automatically when changing your class or job.
The Grand Company selection button and the checkbox for equipping Actions have been removed from the PvP tab of the Actions & Traits interface.
The ability Cleric Stance will no longer be usable in PvP areas.
The ability Cleric Stance will no longer be usable in PvP areas.

new_content.description: New accessibility system for Windows version to visualize sounds as waveforms.
